blocks.text: Match preview: England face New Zealand in 2nd Test (TEST) on Wed, 17 Jun, 2026, 3:30 pm at Kennington Oval London. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Seam-friendly English conditions; overcast skies assist swing bowlers.
Light drizzle · High 23°C / Low 18°C · Rain: 0.3 mm · Wind: up to 22 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
